coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
伐柯如何？匪斧不克。取妻如何？匪媒不得。
伐柯伐柯，其則不遠。我覯之子？籩豆有踐。
translation_text:
How he hews an axe-handle!
How he hews it, indeed!
It is not far to seek;
In your wife you have the pattern.

How he hews an axe-handle!
How he hews it, indeed!
It is not far to seek;
The man and the woman are distinguished.
